title: Electron Native Application Generator
description: Nx generator for creating a new Electron desktop application that bundles a domain frontend SSR server

name.description: Application name without the native- prefix (for example agent-console)
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use?

domain.description: Product domain folder and Nx project name prefix
domain.x-prompt: Which domain should this app belong to?

frontendProject.description: Nx project name of the frontend app to bundle (defaults to {domain}-frontend-{name})
frontendProject.x-prompt: Which frontend Nx project should this native app bundle?

title.description: Window and titlebar label shown in the desktop shell
title.x-prompt: What title should the desktop window use?
